message.content:
Explore all `page-*.php` files in `/Users/jbiggs/code/buy-hh/buy-honehealth-com/themes/HoneLandingPages/src/`. There are about 50 of them.

Your goal: identify sections of HTML/PHP that appear identically (or near-identically) across multiple templates and could be extracted into reusable `template-parts/` components. 

Already-existing template parts (in `src/template-parts/`) are: carousel-navigation.php, cta-block.php, image.php, linkbar.php, navbar.php, percentage-circle.php, slick-navigation.php, x-in-x-stat.php. Don't list these.

For each candidate component you find, report:
1. A descriptive name for the component
2. A brief description of what it contains (the HTML structure / purpose)
3. The exact list of template files it appears in (and a count)
4. How similar the instances are (identical, near-identical with minor text differences, or structurally similar with different content)

Look for things like:
- Hero/banner sections
- Trustpilot widgets or review sections
- "How it works" step sections
- Pricing sections
- FAQ/accordion sections
- CTA (call-to-action) blocks beyond what's in cta-block.php
- Footer disclaimers or medical disclaimers
- Video embed sections
- Testimonial/review carousels
- "What we test" or treatment info sections
- Stats/numbers sections
- Comparison tables
- Quiz sections
- Any other repeated HTML blocks

Read through ALL the page-*.php files thoroughly. Be comprehensive.

content.text: I'll explore all the `page-*.php` files in the source directory to identify repeated HTML/PHP sections that could be extracted into reusable components.
Now let me read through all of these files to identify repeated sections. I'll start by reading them all:

Know Your Body

327→

Feeling off and can’t figure out why? Your body could be trying to tell you something. Hormonal imbalances—like testosterone, estradiol, and progesterone—might be behind symptoms like weight changes, mood swings, or low energy. Hone’s simple test helps you uncover what’s happening inside so you can take control of your health and start feeling like yourself again.

Hone’s comprehensive health report evaluates 40+ biomarkers, giving you a clear and complete picture of your well-being. From key hormones to overall health markers, your results are actionable and easy to understand. With access to 2,000+ testing locations, learning about your body has never been more convenient.

Receive Personalized Care

675→

676→ Hone provides administrative and management services to independently physician-owned and operated medical practices. Hone licenses the “Hone” brand name to Broad Health, P.C., and other affiliated medical practices that use Hone’s business support services. Each Hone-branded medical practice is owned and operated by a licensed physician. 677→

678→ There is no single provider of medical care called “Hone”. Each Hone-branded practice engages a network of United States-based clinicians who provide clinical telehealth services. The clinicians deliver clinical services to their patients via the Hone platform. Hone does not provide medical advice or care, own or operate the medical practices, employ or in any way supervise the clinicians providing medical care, and control over the care provided, is the sole responsibility of the independent medical practices and the clinicians they employ. Services and practices may vary across clinicians, and patients should contact the clinicians at Broad Health, P.C., directly for all questions concerning their medical care. 679→

134→ Buying testosterone online or from a doctor’s office can be a big 135→ step. But online testosterone therapy is legal and safer than ever, 136→ as long as you’re working with a reputable company. 137→

138→

139→ Stringent safeguards in telemedicine have helped ensure that 140→ prescribing testosterone can happen only if all parties (doctor, 141→ patient, and pharmacy) remain in legal compliance with the 142→ guidelines imposed by the Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA). 143→

Is it legal to buy testosterone online?

173→

174→ Yes! It is 100 percent legal to buy testosterone online, as long 175→ you have a prescription, and the site that you are buying from 176→ follows DEA guidelines. 177→

178→

179→ If a site states that you don’t require a prescription or don’t 180→ need to show proof of a diagnosed medical condition, do not buy 181→ from them. They are not in compliance with DEA guidelines, and 182→ chances are they’re operating illegally. 183→

184→

185→ If a pharmacy doesn’t have an actual US address or claims they can 186→ provide testosterone prescriptions online after you fill out a 187→ short form, do not engage with them. Filling out a form does not 188→ qualify you to receive a viable, legal prescription. 189→

190→

191→ These guidelines are completely for your benefit and well-being. 192→ Here’s what they entail: 193→

194→
    195→
  • 196→ Having a medical condition that has been validly diagnosed by a 197→ physician with whom there is a legitimate doctor/patient 198→ relationship. 199→
    • 200→
  • 201→ Establishing a preliminary blood panel, a history, and a 202→ physical exam. 203→
    • 204→
  • 205→ Documentation that the doctor and patient have discussed the 206→ risks and benefits of using testosterone based on the patient’s 207→ lab values, medical history, and symptom profile. 208→
    • 209→
  • 210→ That the physician and pharmacy operating online are based and 211→ licensed within the United States. Many states require the 212→ physician to be licensed in the very state where a patient is 213→ located. 214→
    • 215→
216→

Why These Guidelines Are In Place

219→

220→ Testosterone is a male steroid hormone (though testosterone therapy 221→ is not the same as taking anabolic steroids). 222→

223→

224→ In the years since testosterone was first synthesized in the 1930s, 225→ it has been sold for reasons other than to treat clinically 226→ significant deficient hormone levels in men. 227→

228→

229→ For example, some men want to buy testosterone online to increase 230→ athletic or sexual performance or to fight the age-related decrease 231→ of testosterone. 232→

233→

234→ To address the problem, the US government’s Anabolic Steroids 235→ Control Act of 1990 placed testosterone and other 236→ anabolic-androgenic steroids (AAS) in Schedule III of the 237→ Controlled Substances Act. According to the DEA’s website (1), 238→ Schedule III drugs, substances or chemicals are defined as drugs 239→ with a moderate to low potential for physical and psychological 240→ dependence. 241→

242→

243→ If any pharmacy or physician tells you differently, they are either 244→ committing an illegal act or they are not offering you legitimate 245→ testosterone. 246→

How to Legally Buy Testosterone Online

101→

You’ll need a prescription, but we can help you get your TRT virtually.

102→ BY MIKE MCAVENNIE 103→
MEDICALLY REVIEWED BY JIM STAHELI, D.O. 104→
March 4, 2024 105→ 106→
107→ 112→
113→
    114→
  • 115→ 116→ 30-Second Takeaway 117→ 118→
    • 119→
  • 120→ 123→ You can buy testosterone online legally from companies that 124→ are in legal compliance with federal guidelines. 125→
    • 126→
  • 127→ 130→ Avoid buying testosterone from companies that don’t require 131→ lab assessments, prescriptions, or that sell anabolic steroids. 132→
    • 133→
  • 134→ 137→ Hone complies with all legal guidelines and makes getting 138→ testosterone online simple if you have a testosterone deficiency. 139→
    • 140→
141→
142→
143→
144→
145→

Buying testosterone online or from a doctor’s 146→ office can be a big step. But online testosterone therapy is legal and safer than ever, 147→ as long as you’re working with a reputable company.

148→
149→
150→

Stringent safeguards in telemedicine have helped 151→ ensure that prescribing testosterone can happen only if all parties (doctor, patient, 152→ and pharmacy) remain in legal compliance with the guidelines imposed by the Drug 153→ Enforcement Administration (DEA).

154→
155→
156→

So how do you go about obtaining testosterone 157→ online, legally? It’s natural to have some basic questions. Fortunately, we can provide 158→ you with in-depth answers.

159→
160→
161→
162→ 172→
173→
174→

Live The Life You Always Imagined

175→

Hone’s testosterone assessment is fast and simple. If your 176→ levels are low, our providers can create a personalized treatment plan to 177→ help you feel your best.

178→
179→
180→

190→

195→

Is it legal to buy testosterone online?

196→
197→
198→

Yes! It is 100 percent legal to buy testosterone 199→ online, as long you have a prescription, and the site that you are buying from follows 200→ DEA guidelines.

201→
202→
203→

If a site states that you don’t require a 204→ prescription or don’t need to show proof of a diagnosed medical condition, do not buy 205→ from them. They are not in compliance with DEA guidelines, and chances are they’re 206→ operating illegally.

207→
208→
209→

If a pharmacy doesn’t have an actual US address 210→ or claims they can provide testosterone prescriptions online after you fill out a short 211→ form, do not engage with them. Filling out a form does not qualify you to receive a 212→ viable, legal prescription.

213→
214→
215→

These guidelines are completely for your benefit 216→ and well-being. Here’s what they entail:

217→
218→
219→
220→
    221→
  • 222→ 225→ Having a medical condition that has been validly 226→ diagnosed by a physician with whom there is a legitimate doctor/patient 227→ relationship. 228→
    • 229→
  • 230→ 233→ Establishing a preliminary blood panel, a history, and a 234→ physical exam. 235→
    • 236→
  • 237→ 240→ Documentation that the doctor and patient have discussed 241→ the risks and benefits of using testosterone based on the patient’s lab 242→ values, medical history, and symptom profile. 243→
    • 244→
  • 245→ 248→ That the physician and pharmacy operating online are 249→ based and licensed within the United States. Many states require the 250→ physician to be licensed in the very state where a patient is 251→ located. 252→
    • 253→
254→
255→
256→
257→

Why These Guidelines Are In Place

258→
259→
260→

Testosterone is a male steroid hormone (though 261→ testosterone therapy is not the same as taking anabolic steroids).

262→
263→
264→

In the years since testosterone was first 265→ synthesized in the 1930s, it has been sold for reasons other than to treat clinically 266→ significant deficient hormone levels in men.

267→
268→
269→

For example, some men want to buy testosterone 270→ online to increase athletic or sexual performance or to fight the age-related decrease 271→ of testosterone.

272→
273→
274→

To address the problem, the US government’s 275→ Anabolic Steroids Control Act of 1990 placed testosterone and other anabolic-androgenic 276→ steroids (AAS) in Schedule III of the Controlled Substances Act. According to the DEA’s 277→ website (1), Schedule III drugs, substances or chemicals are defined as drugs with a 278→ moderate to low potential for physical and psychological dependence.

279→
280→
281→

If any pharmacy or physician tells you 282→ differently, they are either committing an illegal act or they are not offering you 283→ legitimate testosterone.

284→
285→
286→

291→

We are fully compliant with all federal and 294→ state laws regarding the prescription and sale of testosterone. Our team has worked 295→ tirelessly to provide you with a safe, legal, and simple step-by-step process.

Hone’s partner lab is accredited by the Clinical 307→ Laboratory Improvement Amendments (CLIA) and the College of American Pathologists (CAP). 308→ The Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) regulates all clinical laboratory 309→ testing performed on humans in the United States through CLIA.

Why These Guidelines Are In Place

263→

265→

Testosterone is a male steroid hormone (though 266→ testosterone therapy is not the same as taking anabolic steroids). 267→

To address the problem, the US government’s 277→ Anabolic Steroids Control Act of 1990 placed testosterone and other anabolic-androgenic 278→ steroids (AAS) in Schedule III of the Controlled Substances Act. According to the DEA’s 279→ website (1), Schedule III drugs, substances or chemicals are defined as drugs with a 280→ moderate to low potential for physical and psychological dependence. 281→

You’ll Have More Energy

438→

You’ll Build Muscle and Burn Belly Fat Faster

454→

Diet, rest, and exercise are key to your success. However, when your testosterone levels dip below your normal range, your strength strains, your body mass gets mushy, and your once-unbeatable endurance ends. The only thing low testosterone builds up is fat deposits around your midsection, which leaves you to carry a growing problem wherever you go.

    Hone is an online clinic that helps men and women manage their health. As part of your subscription and as medically indicated, physicians prescribe medications, and recommend supplements that are delivered to you from the comfort of your home.

    Hone-affiliated medical practices are independently owned and operated by licensed physicians who provide services using the Hone telehealth platform. For more information about the relationship between Hone and the medical practices click here.

    Refunds: If your order has not yet shipped, you are eligible for a full refund of your order. You can contact a member of our Customer Success team at support@honehealth.com, and we’ll assist you in canceling your order. Because our orders contain medical equipment, we are not able to accept returns on items that have been shipped.
